info.name: Uniswap Dex Data (HTTP)
info.description:
GraphQL queries against the Uniswap V3 subgraph via GraphQL with HTTP request.

### Setup

To retrieve your own API key, you'll need to connect your crypto wallet to the [https://thegraph.com/studio/apikeys/](https://thegraph.com/studio/apikeys/).

Add the API key into the collection variable named `apiKey`.

request.description: Fetches the full GraphQL schema via introspection.

List 100 pools with the following attributes.

```
id
token0 id
token0 symbol
token1 id
token1 symbol

 ```

item.name: List top 100 liquidity pools since past week

request.description:
Dynamically computes a Unix timestamp for 7 days ago via a pre-request script, then lists pools ordered by liquidity descending with the following attributes.

```
id
token0 id
token0 symbol
token1 id
token1 symbol

 ```

Get detailed data for a single pool by contract address with the following attributes.

`id` is set locally via pre-request script (before script).

```
id
token0 id
token0 symbol
token0 derivedETH
token1 id
token1 symbol
token1 derivedETH
liquidity
token0Price
token1Price
volumeToken0
volumeToken1
volumeUSD
totalValueLockedUSD

 ```

variable.description: Your Graph API key from https://thegraph.com/studio
